curator_log.rescue_path: 1 (restore legacy.bak: test.sh + test_manifest.yaml) + 3 (prior DROP read instruction.md as the entire task spec; ignored that instruction.md is the FIRST user turn only -- the screenshot path is a quirk of session capture, the substantive task continues across 5 user turns and the canonical patch reflects 8 files / 266+/58- lines of real implementation work).
curator_log.drop_reason_overturned: Prior DROP cited a dead screenshot path in instruction.md as the blocker. Two errors. (1) Per claudeMd, instruction.md = first user turn verbatim. The screenshot path is an artifact of the user dragging a screencap into the terminal; the text portion ('what do we need to do to ensure cwd skills/themes/extensions/commands come first and beat global ones?') plus the 5-turn user-sim trigger table is sufficient context to drive the multi-turn correction loop. The session continues with substantive work: T2 disagrees with dropping entire extensions on conflict and tells agent to implement+test, T3 asks for explanation of the flag-default guard pattern, T4 asks for CHANGELOG entry, T5 asks for commit/push/release. fix_summary.md explicitly documents 'No solution leakage: instruction describes the desired behavior/symptom, not the fix code' and 'instruction describes symptom (\"ensure cwd first\"), not fix.' (2) The task already has a comprehensive purpose-built verifier saved at tests/test.sh.legacy.bak (342 lines): 4 inline F2P sub-gates (EXT_ORDER / SKILL_ORDER / THEME_ORDER / CMD_ORDER each at 0.25 weight) checking project-before-global ordering via DefaultPackageManager.resolve(), plus an upstream f2p_upstream_cmd_bare_name gate (weight 0.20) verifying first-duplicate-command-keeps-bare-name semantics, plus P2P_REGRESSION gates (p2p_upstream_tsgo scoped to changed files, p2p_upstream_pm_tests for the 91 package-manager tests). The active test.sh had been clobbered to a SWE-rebench template with FAIL_TO_PASS=[]/PASS_TO_PASS=[] in install_config.json -- it falls back to overall-pass-rate over every vitest in the monorepo, which is a meaningless signal for this task. The canonical patch (artifacts_pi-mono/canonical_patches/24c56fa6-6121-4099-8a40-2ed0754ef445.json) confirms the legacy verifier hits the right surface: package-manager.ts (39+/39- swap of project/global resolve order), extensions/loader.ts (+!runtime.flagValues.has(name) guard, swap discovery order), extensions/runner.ts (first-registration-wins for tools/flags/commands), resource-loader.ts (keep-all-extensions-loaded on conflict). fix_summary.md records prior agent-discrimination tuning: Sonnet 0.50 vs Haiku 0.10 (gap 0.40), nop=0.10 -- exactly the legacy verifier we just restored.
fixes_applied: Restored tests/test.sh from tests/test.sh.legacy.bak (84 -> 342 lines, replaces SWE-rebench inert stub with purpose-built verifier covering 4 inline F2P resolve-ordering sub-gates + upstream cmd_bare_name F2P gate + tsgo/pm_tests P2P_REGRESSION gates with weighted-replace tail formula).
Restored tests/test_manifest.yaml from tests/test_manifest.yaml.legacy.bak (3 gates: F2P f2p_upstream_cmd_bare_name weight=0.20, P2P_REGRESSION p2p_upstream_tsgo + p2p_upstream_pm_tests weight=0).
Left tests/install_config.json untouched (_upgraded_from_legacy: true, FAIL_TO_PASS=[]) -- now unused since restored test.sh ignores it; kept for archaeology.
curator_log.notes: Pre-existing CI lint finding (R006: single dominant F2P gate with weight > 0.50) tracked in MEMORY.md for this task. The dominant-gate concern is the inline 4x0.25 accumulator (sums to 1.0 in the local script). The manifest's only declared F2P weight is f2p_upstream_cmd_bare_name=0.20 which feeds the weighted-replace tail formula correctly (existing*0.80 + 0.20 if pass) -- effective dominant-gate share at the manifest level is bounded. Not a blocker for KEEP. canonical_patch session_id=24c56fa6-6121-4099-8a40-2ed0754ef445, base_commit=380236a003ec7f0e69f54463b0f00b3118d78f3c, _fidelity=exact, files_changed=8, total_additions=266, total_deletions=58. patch_library evidence: deepseek_v4_pro/ops.json contains real edits to skills.ts/resource-loader.ts/prompt-templates.ts (the canonical solution surface) -- agents are demonstrably attempting this task on its actual substance. Recommendation: spot-check on a fresh trial to confirm nop_baseline ~0.10 (only P2P prelude passes) and an Opus-style fix scores >=0.50.
